# ClearlyDefined License Checker

<!-- Auto-generated by make generate. Do not edit manually. -->

Fetches license metadata from ClearlyDefined.

| Property | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Matcher name | `clearlydefined-license-checker` |
| Runs by default | No |
| Requires enrichment | Yes |
| Uses network | Yes |
| Cache behavior | Uses Bomly's matcher cache; cache failures are non-fatal. |
| Output fields | license value, license source, matched package flag |
| Capabilities | `license-enrichment`, `http` |

## User Notes

Run with `--enrich` when you want ClearlyDefined license evidence.
